_note: Standard base plate and anchor bolt configurations per post type. Source: Rowena / Union Noise drawings, April 2026.
_usage: Connection checks use these as starting configurations. If any UR >= 1.0, upsize to next configuration in the list.
_ds_derivation: Ds = base_plate.height_mm / 2 — PE simplified base plate method. Ds is derived in code, not stored.

configurations._source_note: Standard reference configuration from Rowena drawings, April 2026. Not confirmed to match any specific PE report plate layout. Verify before submission.

bolts._Ds_note: Ds derived as plate_height/2 = 350/2 = 175mm. Unvalidated — pending PE drawing review.

configurations._source_note: Standard reference configuration from Rowena drawings, April 2026. Not confirmed to match any specific PE report plate layout. Verify before submission.

bolts._Ds_note: Ds derived as plate_height/2 = 530/2 = 265mm. Unvalidated — pending PE drawing review.

configurations._source_note: Confirmed from P105 T2 drawing D-P105-TNCB-3002, April 2026.
configurations._concrete_grade: C28/35 — fck=28 N/mm2 per P105 T2 material schedule. Use for embedment check.

bolts._Ds_note: Ds = plate_height/2 = 600/2 = 300mm. PE simplified base plate method confirmed from P105 T2 drawing D-P105-TNCB-3002. Not bolt-row to bolt-row spacing.

configurations._layout_note: 3 columns x 2 rows. Bolt template shows 50|125|125|50 horizontally (cols at 50, 175, 300mm) and 50|500|50 vertically (rows at 50mm and 550mm). Confirmed from P105 T2 drawing D-P105-TNCB-3002.

stiffener_plate.note: 8mm THK stiffener plate — confirm with PE whether this affects weld or bearing checks

configurations.source: Drawing D-P105-TNCB-3002 — P105 T2 Base Plate
